programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: To prove her worth in the Underground, Jane brings Larry to rural Arkansas to help her retrieve an invaluable item; Niles organises a special day for Dorothy while she hides a personal development from her father.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Before they can save the world from The Candlemaker, the Doom Patrol must first confront their childhood imaginary friends. Meanwhile, Dorothy must make a fateful choice.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Before they can save the world from The Candlemaker, the Doom Patrol must first confront their childhood imaginary friends. Meanwhile, Dorothy must make a fateful choice.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Larry tries in vain to restore the Doom Patrol to their normal size after the events of last season; the team deal with their personal issues while trying to learn their powers.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Cliff, Jane, and Rita pursue Dr Tyme and his time altering mineral, in their quest to help Niles and Dorothy; Larry comes face-to-face with his past at a funeral.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Cliff, Jane, and Rita pursue Dr Tyme and his time altering mineral, in their quest to help Niles and Dorothy; Larry comes face-to-face with his past at a funeral.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Niles, Rita, and Larry end up in the inter-dimensional palace of Red Jack who has taken Larry prisoner; Cliff visits his daughter with Jane; Dorothy's game of hide-and-seek ends badly.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Dannyzens throw a massive party at Doom Manor to resuscitate Danny the Brick. As the party rages on, Rita asks Flex Mentallo to help unleash her full potential, which has some dangerously racy consequences.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Dannyzens throw a massive party at Doom Manor to resuscitate Danny the Brick. As the party rages on, Rita asks Flex Mentallo to help unleash her full potential, which has some dangerously racy consequences.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Dorothy finds a new friend in Baby Doll; Niles plans to give Cliff human-like upgrades; Larry brings Rita to meet his family after she has a lousy audition.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As Niles and Cliff set out to find a missing Dorothy, Larry is tasked with handling Niles' old research team when the ageless aeronauts return from space.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As Niles and Cliff set out to find a missing Dorothy, Larry is tasked with handling Niles' old research team when the ageless aeronauts return from space.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: While Niles heads north to find Dorothy's mother, the Doom Patrol embraces their inner morons after receiving a mysterious package.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: While Niles heads north to find Dorothy's mother, the Doom Patrol embraces their inner morons after receiving a mysterious package.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: To prove her worth in the Underground, Jane brings Larry to rural Arkansas to help her retrieve an invaluable item; Niles organises a special day for Dorothy while she hides a personal development from her father.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Before they can save the world from The Candlemaker, the Doom Patrol must first confront their childhood imaginary friends. Meanwhile, Dorothy must make a fateful choice.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Dorothy faces the Candlemaker with tragic results, while the team struggle with loss. Rita may hold the key, but is he ready to answer?

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: A relaxing vacation to escape the Doom Patrol's recent loss proves to be anything but, especially when an unexpected evil lurks nearby.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Thrown back in time, Rita navigates the Bureau of Normalcy. Jane gives Kay her first freedom, while Larry finds long-needed closure with his son.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Warned by the Sisterhood of Dada, Madame Rouge raises the alarm. The Doom Patrol must rally or risk the Eternal Flagellation consuming them.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Warned by the Sisterhood of Dada, Madame Rouge raises the alarm. The Doom Patrol must rally or risk the Eternal Flagellation consuming them.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The fog forces the Doom Patrol to relive shameful moments until breakthroughs come. Rita pieces together Madame Rouge's hidden history.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: With the Brotherhood closing in, the Doom Patrol must unite and embrace their true selves, or risk losing everything once and for all.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: With the Brotherhood closing in, the Doom Patrol must unite and embrace their true selves, or risk losing everything once and for all.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Dorothy faces the Candlemaker with tragic results, while the team struggle with loss. Rita may hold the key, but is he ready to answer?

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Dorothy faces the Candlemaker with tragic results, while the team struggle with loss. Rita may hold the key, but is he ready to answer?

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: A relaxing vacation to escape the Doom Patrol's recent loss proves to be anything but, especially when an unexpected evil lurks nearby.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: In the tunnel of souls, the team confront personal purgatories. At the manor, Dorothy and Larry turn to a specialised detective agency for help.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Doom Patrol are back in the land of the living, but their time spent in the afterlife has come with some unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Doom Patrol are back in the land of the living, but their time spent in the afterlife has come with some unexpected consequences.

programme.title: AFLW: PF NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: AFLW: PF Brisbane v Carlton
programme.desc: A blockbuster Preliminary Final as Brisbane and Carlton battle it out for a place in the 2025 decider under lights in Springfield.

programme.title: AFLW: PF Brisbane v Carlton
programme.desc: A blockbuster Preliminary Final as Brisbane and Carlton battle it out for a place in the 2025 decider under lights in Springfield.

programme.title: AFL: Melbourne v Richmond
programme.desc: Melbourne finally have their first win and will host Richmond in the traditional ANZAC Eve clash at the MCG.

programme.title: AFLW: QF MEL v BRI
programme.desc: A long-standing AFLW rivalry writes a new chapter on Sunday with Melbourne and Brisbane fighting for a home Preliminary Final.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1994 R6 MEL v COL
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1994 R6 MEL v COL

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate the best of the best in the AFLW, as we award the Rising Star, All Australian Team, and Best & Fairest Player of 2025.

programme.title: The W Awards
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate the best of the best in the AFLW, as we award the Rising Star, All Australian Team, and Best & Fairest Player of 2025.

programme.title: Undefeated
programme.desc: They didn't drop a game throughout the 2024 home and away season, but the Kangaroos had to face their demons to win the Grand Final.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: '24 GF NM v BRI
programme.desc: Grand finals are where the glory lies. In the lead up to this year's AFLW Grand Final, take a look back at previous years deciders.

programme.desc: They didn't drop a game throughout the 2024 home and away season, but the Kangaroos had to face their demons to win the Grand Final.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1998 R22 NM v WB
programme.desc: 1998, Round 22. The 'King' Wayne Carey is arguably the best to have ever played - and he shows us why in this game against the Dogs, in a last quarter that has to be seen to be believed.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's the grand final! The five comedians give their all to impress Greg and accumulate the most points to be crowned series champion.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's the grand final! The five comedians give their all to impress Greg and accumulate the most points to be crowned series champion.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We start the show with a good old-fashioned Double Decker Bust Up, before locking up the latest batch of unruly drivers, Behind Bars.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We start the show with a chance for us to appraise the ability of the local cabbies in Rate My Ride, and another chance for us to get all judgmental in Identify The Idiot.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The participants continue to look for new ways to hunt and to preserve their food sources. One survivalist leans on a taxing shelter build, while another pauses their own work for some needed sustenance.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team dive in search of an A3 Skywarrior attack aircraft that was lost in a suspicious disaster, off the USS Saratoga aircraft carrier in 1960.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: Where else can you get a smash burger, ride in a tuktuk and find spiritual LPs? Turns out it's Richmond, Virginia.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: Where else can you get a smash burger, ride in a tuktuk and find spiritual LPs? Turns out it's Richmond, Virginia.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: Adam takes Jon to Atlanta, to eat his favourite wings at Magic City, drink at his favourite bar and to poop at his favourite rapper's house.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: Adam takes Jon to Atlanta, to eat his favourite wings at Magic City, drink at his favourite bar and to poop at his favourite rapper's house.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: The origin of the sleuth and member of the Mystery Inc. gang, Velma.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We start the show by getting in the ring to go 12 rounds with Bike Tyson before playing everyone's favourite car crash-related guessing game Hit Or Miss.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We take a break from all things wheel-related and observe the antics of some Pedestrians before once again spending a couple of relaxing minutes being all judgemental in Identify The Idiot.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Mel B. guest stars alongside regulars Wayne Brady, Gary Anthony Williams and Colin Mochrie.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Kunal Nayyar guest stars alongside regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Ceci says Colette's kindness is for show, Colette secretly gives Noa the perfect gift to prove her heart's in the right place.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Five new contestants take on hilarious challenges, hoping to impress Greg Davies with wit and creativity as they compete to claim the Taskmaster crown.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Five new contestants take on hilarious challenges, hoping to impress Greg Davies with wit and creativity as they compete to claim the Taskmaster crown.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: A speeder, not even driving his own vehicle, actually tries to persuade the officer that he accelerated to escape a van that was following him.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay. Art face's the last open ice crossing his first since his near fatal trip.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay. Art face's the last open ice crossing his first since his near fatal trip.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: The LeBeau brothers fleet battles muddy, sinking roads to get the last logs down the mountain before spring 'break up' sends them all home.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: The LeBeau brothers fleet battles muddy, sinking roads to get the last logs down the mountain before spring 'break up' sends them all home.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Stanton, Dave finds that sometimes making a profit is like pulling teeth. Mary grinds to get into the black, while Ivy's locker ends up sucking and blowing.

programme.title: Motorbike Cops
programme.desc: Illegal use of mobile phones continues to be a problem, and drivers routinely ignore road works speed restrictions.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Long distance legend Steve Grahame battles to get to a remote mining outpost.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Ceci says Colette's kindness is for show, Colette secretly gives Noa the perfect gift to prove her heart's in the right place.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette learns Noa is seeing someone, Ceci urges her to use a little magic to win him back. Meanwhile, Barb hunts for the culprit behind rude DMV graffiti.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Santa Ana, the buyers face 10 vaults belonging to the same owner. Dave snaps up almost half of them, but in the end, Mary and Kenny end up doing all the heavy lifting.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Stanton, Dave finds that sometimes making a profit is like pulling teeth. Mary grinds to get into the black, while Ivy's locker ends up sucking and blowing.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes
programme.desc: A classic comedy based around a group of WWII soldiers who plan to steal a treasure trove from the Nazis.

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes
programme.desc: A classic comedy based around a group of WWII soldiers who plan to steal a treasure trove from the Nazis.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: A big-hearted family man's plan for a peaceful getaway at a lakeside resort is ruined when his obnoxious brother-in-law turns up with his weirdo brood.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Sharon and Tim's new pool is stuck 100m away; Chris and Jolyon rush to finish a guest room.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: We look at how the nursing profession has changed from the 19th century to the present day. Fiona Bruce meets comedian Jo Brand, a former psychiatric nurse, and hears about her experience.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Caroline Hawley and Paul Laidlaw are at Newark Antiques fair for some festive frolics.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: See the heart-stopping helmet cam footage of a motorbike accident that sees a father and son rushed to Emergency.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: We look at how the nursing profession has changed from the 19th century to the present day. Fiona Bruce meets comedian Jo Brand, a former psychiatric nurse, and hears about her experience.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Alison Hammond's Florida Unpacked
programme.desc: Former tour rep Alison and son Aidan head to Florida seeking family adventure in true American style. Can they embrace the Sunshine State without blowing their budget?

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Pia Miranda and Mike Reid explore Iceland's waterfalls, whales, and lagoons before London glamour at The Shard with fine dining above the city.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are professional property hunters, out to help home buyers through the murky world of agencies and viewings in a bid to find their perfect home.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: In the Quarter Final, sewers tackle a pyjama blouse, transform shapewear and lace, and create fitted bustier dresses. Who will secure a spot in the next round?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Andrew, Shaynna and Charlie are back and helping a family of six who are bursting at the seams in a two-bedroom house. Can the team get them a quick sale so they can move on?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a mother and daughter find a Dartmoor home for their family and new horse and yoga retreat venture.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Before the Accession, Fiona welcomes the Queen Consort and learns of her close ties to the Eden Project and The Big Lunch.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: A stone's throw from the city of Melbourne, you'll find a bit of magic hidden in plain sight. Rippon Lea Estate is home to a stunning 19th-century mansion surrounded by seven hectares of Victorian gardens.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys want to revamp their abandoned orangery, but it's flooding. The Hutsons need to chop down a huge tree precariously close to a greenhouse.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Mary and David have made the decision to move to mainland Australia due to limited work. They live in a picturesque location, but can the team bring their house up to standards and help this family move on?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: Celebs watch Bake Off: The Professionals, Noel Edmonds' Kiwi Adventure, Celebrity Puzzling, and Olivia Attwood: The Price of Perfection.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: See the heart-stopping helmet cam footage of a motorbike accident that sees a father and son rushed to Emergency.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary true story of a brilliant young master of deception and the FBI agent hot on his trail.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
programme.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. The young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programme.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
programme.desc: Kya, an abandoned girl who raised herself in dangerous marshland, is drawn to two young men from town. When one is found dead, she is the main suspect.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman unexpectedly gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home on a train.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: On the verge of having their conspiracy exposed, members of the government's intelligence community will stop at nothing to erase all evidence of their top secret programs; even the agents involved.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: The Swan Princess Christmas
programme.desc: Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their trusted woodland friends reunite in this adventure for their first Christmas celebration together!

programme.title: Christmas on Division Street
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: The Angel Tree
programme.desc: A writer reconnects with a childhood friend while seeking the identity of the person who grants Christmas wishes placed upon an angel tree.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Featuring the music of George Michael, this film follows a hapless Londoner who works in a Christmas shop and becomes involved with a man who could be the answer to her problems.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops and are forced overcome their differences to solve an important case.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Dr Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: Black and Missing
programme.desc: Multiple Emmy winner Geeta Gandbhir and award-winning documentarian Soledad O'Brien explore crime-related stories surrounding missing Black people.

programme.title: Voltaire in Love
programme.desc: As Voltaire finds his affections split between an actress and a wealthy marquise, a series of unfortunate events leaves him clutching at life.

programme.title: Voltaire in Love
programme.desc: Voltaire discovers, at his expense, what the friendship of the great lords is worth. To avoid the Bastille, he accepts a new exile to England.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did Sid Vicious's mother play a part in his death? Is KISS a band or a brand? Is Jamie Hewlett of the Gorillaz really Banksy?

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: In Marrakesh, Max and JJ get ready for a uranium exchange with the cartel, while Cassie keeps a close eye on every move they make.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa learns the dark truth about Carrie's past and faces an impossible choice to protect her family.

programme.title: Mr. Mercedes
programme.desc: Hodges gets an unexpected call. Pete has a plan. Morris starts to feel the heat.

programme.title: Atomic
programme.desc: In Marrakesh, Max and JJ get ready for a uranium exchange with the cartel, while Cassie keeps a close eye on every move they make.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: At an abandoned mental health facility, a young couple stumble upon the body of an elderly man in the old hospital wing strapped to a trolley with electrodes connected to his temples.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: Christmas on the Vine
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Noel
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in New York City, and with a little help from each other, five people will discover new meaning on Christmas Day.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: When a smooth-talking bachelor invents an imaginary son in order to meet attractive single mums, he gets a hilarious lesson about life from bright, but hopelessly geeky 12-year-old named Marcus.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: A wisecracking New Yorker, whose one-night stand with a beautiful Mexican girl comes back to bite him - all the way to the altar.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: The American President
programme.desc: When the widowed US president courts a Washington lobbyist, wild rumours decimate his approval ratings. An intelligent political-romantic comedy.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime.

programme.title: The Lost Tiger
programme.desc: Adopted by a wrestler kangaroo family, Teo's life changes when visions guide him to his roots. He sets off on an epic journey to save his homeland from destruction.

programme.title: The Lost Tiger
programme.desc: Adopted by a wrestler kangaroo family, Teo's life changes when visions guide him to his roots. He sets off on an epic journey to save his homeland from destruction.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Gloria and Melman are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover, a travelling circus.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Gloria the Hippo, and Melman the Giraffe are still fighting to get home to their beloved Big Apple and of course, King Julien, Maurice, and the Penguins are all along for the ride. Their journey takes them through Europe where they find the perfect cover: a travelling circus, which they reinvent Madagascar style.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: A bee is abuzz over a scandal: people are stealing honey to eat. With the help of a florist, he sues the human race for 'honey laundering'.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs, and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When the evil spirit Pitch launches an assault on Earth, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into New York City.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Dad-to-be Shrek and his posse embark on a new, trouble-filled adventure, in search of their next king. Another fun family romp.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: In the final chapter of this popular animation franchise, Mike Myers voices Shrek, who is not scaring villagers away like he used to, but now agrees to autograph pitch forks. Longing for the days when he felt like a real ogre, Shrek is duped into signing a pact with the smooth-talking deal-maker, Rumpelstiltskin (Walt Dohrn). Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king and Shrek and Fiona (Cameron Diaz) have never met. Shrek must undo all he's done in the hope of saving his friends, restoring his world and reclaiming his one true love.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek now finds himself in a twisted, alternate version of Far Far Away, where ogres are hunted, Rumpelstiltskin is king, and Shrek and Fiona have never met. He must undo all he's done to save his world.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: The Tale of Despereaux
programme.desc: An unusually brave mouse helps to restore happiness to a forlorn kingdom after making friends with a gentleman rat.

programme.title: High & Low - John Galliano
programme.desc: Director Kevin Macdonald examines fashion designer John Galliano's rapid ascent, fall from grace after an antisemitic tirade, and rehabilitation.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: College student Charlie returns to her family farm to help her mother. Their lives differ, and when Charlie's French grandmother arrives, old wounds resurface.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: College student Charlie returns to her family farm to help her mother. Their lives differ, and when Charlie's French grandmother arrives, old wounds resurface.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Two woefully immature men are forced to live as brothers when their parents decide to get hitched.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A 27-year-old spoiled brat must repeat all 12 grades of school - in just 24 weeks - to earn his father's respect and prove he can run the family's multimillion-dollar empire.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.
